clips.title: The Carousel
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, eerie grade. A deserted fairground at dusk, an old carousel beginning to turn by itself, peeling paint, long shadows. Evening, unsettling. A person in a light coat stands beside the carousel, uneasy. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted hard, geometry off-balance. Cool dusk light, faded color, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Room Service
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, unsettling grade. A long hotel corridor at night, endless identical doors, patterned carpet, one door slightly ajar spilling light. Night. A person in a robe stands mid-corridor looking toward the open door. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted, corridor canted. Cold green-tinged light, deep perspective, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Prescription
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A late-night pharmacy, shelves of bottles, a buzzing fluorescent tube flickering overhead, a counter. Night. A person in a coat waits at the counter, tense under the harsh light. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted, shelves canted. Cold flickering light, hard shadow, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Button
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, claustrophobic grade. The interior of an old elevator, brushed metal, a panel of glowing floor buttons. A person in office attire stands facing the panel, hand hovering, uneasy. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted hard, the box canted. Cool overhead light, tight space, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Endgame
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. An abandoned park at dusk, an outdoor stone chess table mid-game, overgrown weeds, empty benches. Evening. A person in a coat stands over the chessboard, studying the frozen game. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted, scene off-kilter. Cool fading light, long shadows, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stop
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, noir grade. A rainy city bus stop at night, a flickering shelter light, wet pavement reflecting neon, empty street. Night. A person in a coat waits under the shelter, watchful. The frame is held in a strong static Dutch angle, horizon tilted hard, street canted. Cool wet reflections, neon spill, 35mm, Dutch angle. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.
